headline: Will Align’s US$200 Million India Plant Shift Align Technology's (ALGN) Global Expansion and Efficiency Narrative?
summary: Align Technology recently disclosed plans to invest about US$200,000,000 in a new clear-aligner manufacturing facility in Hyderabad, India, scheduled to open in 2027 and create more than 300 direct jobs as its first production site in the country. This expansion, alongside Align’s existing Global Capability Center and Innovation Center in Hyderabad, points to a deeper integration of Indian operations into its global supply chain and manufacturing footprint. Next, we’ll examine how this...
